message:
fix(arrow): correct schema column count detection in IPC reader

The schema detection heuristic was incorrectly counting 4 columns
instead of 3 for Arrow IPC files, causing SELECT * queries to crash
with SIGSEGV when accessing out-of-bounds column data.

Changed the detection to:
1. Look for the fields vector count at offset 0x30 in the Schema
   Flatbuffers message
2. Fallback to scanning for the first valid count value

This fixes the use-after-free crash in Arrow SELECT * queries.
